calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions And For Rescission Of Contracts
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Klingenberg, via ZOOM, for Larry Lee, Petitioner.

The court begins by advising counsel of its intent to deny this petition and asks counsel if he has any testimony to add. Counsel does not offer any testimony but does point to a similar case where this court granted the petition. Regardless, the court advises counsel once again that it intends to confirm its tentative. No additional testimony is provided.

The Petition for Instructions and Rescission of Contracts is denied.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
